option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Health App (Android)
A simple Android app for entering and storing personal health measurements.
The app is built with **Jetpack Compose** for UI, **Room** for local persistence, and follows **MVVM + Repository** architecture.
## What the app does
- Add a new health measurement (name, surname, date, heart rate, SpO2, temperature) - Validate input values before saving - Save measurements to a local Room database - Show details of a selected measurement - Show all saved measurements in a list - Edit existing measurements - Delete measurements (swipe-to-delete with confirmation) - Show Snackbar feedback for insert/update/delete/error operations - Support Slovenian and English UI strings
## Tech stack
- Kotlin - Jetpack Compose + Material 3 - Navigation Compose - ViewModel + StateFlow - Kotlin Coroutines + Flow - Room (with KSP) - Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material 3 - MVVM + Repository, StateFlow, Coroutines/Flow - Room + KSP - Firebase Auth + Firestore - Retrofit + Gson - Android Sensor API
## Requirements
- Android Studio (recent stable version) - Android SDK: - **minSdk = 28** - **targetSdk = 36** - **compileSdk = 36** - JDK 11+
## Project structure
```text app/src/main/java/com/example/health_app/ data/ Meritev.kt MeritevDao.kt MeritevDatabase.kt MeritevRepository.kt ui/ navigation/ NavGraph.kt screens/ VnosMeritveScreen.kt SeznamMeritevScreen.kt PodrobnostiMeritveScreen.kt theme/ viewmodel/ MeritevViewModel.kt MainActivity.kt
app/src/main/res/ values/strings.xml values-en/strings.xml ```
## Setup instructions
1. Open the project in Android Studio. 2. Let Gradle sync finish. 3. Make sure an emulator/device with API 28+ is available. 4. Run the `app` configuration. ```javascript rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /meritve/{meritevId} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId; allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId; ```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" .\gradlew.bat :app:installDebug ``` } } } ```
## Run from terminal
```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug ```
Optional Kotlin compile check:
```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" .\gradlew.bat :app:compileDebugKotlin ```
## Navigation flow
## Main Flow - `VnosMeritveScreen` (input form) - Save -> persists measurement and opens details/list flow - "Seznam meritev" button -> opens list - `SeznamMeritevScreen` (all measurements) - Tap card -> open details - Edit icon -> open input form pre-filled - Swipe left -> delete confirmation 1. Start on Auth screen if not logged in. ## Important Notes - Room schema changes use destructive migration in this school project setup. ## Suggested Manual Test Checklist - Mock API endpoints in `MockHealthApi.kt` should be replaced with real URLs. - Firestore query with `whereEqualTo + orderBy` may require a composite index (Firebase Console will provide a link in logs). 2. After login/register, open measurement input screen. 3. Save creates local Room record and tries cloud upload. 4. List screen supports search, delete, edit, cloud sync, and logout. - `PodrobnostiMeritveScreen` (single measurement details) - Back navigation - Edit action
## Validation rules
Before saving:
- `ime` and `priimek` must not be empty - `srcniUtrip` must be between **30 and 250** bpm - `SpO2` must be between **0 and 100** - `temperatura` must be between **34.0 and 42.0** °C - Register with valid email and password (>= 6 chars). - Logout and login again. - Save measurement and confirm it appears in list/details. - Use sync button on list screen. - Disable network and verify local save still works. - Switch language to Slovenian/English and verify UI text.
Invalid fields display inline error text.
## Database details
- Entity: `Meritev` - Table: `meritve` - DAO operations: - `insert` - `update` - `delete` - `getAll(): Flow<List<Meritev>>` - `getById(id: Int): Flow<Meritev?>`
`MeritevDatabase` is implemented as a singleton Room database.
## Language support
All UI strings are externalized:
- Slovenian: `app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml` - English: `app/src/main/res/values-en/strings.xml`
## Notes
- Date input uses Material 3 `DatePickerDialog`. - The app uses reactive flows from Room so the list updates automatically when data changes. - Current Room setup uses destructive migration fallback for schema version changes during development.
## Quick test checklist
- Insert valid measurement -> success snackbar appears - Invalid inputs -> field-level error messages appear - Open list -> new measurement is visible - Open details -> all fields shown correctly - Edit measurement -> changes are saved - Delete measurement -> item is removed after confirmation - Switch device language (SL/EN) -> strings change correctly

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Health App
Android app for entering, storing, and syncing health measurements.
## What this project includes
- Jetpack Compose + Material 3 UI - MVVM architecture with Repository layer - Room local database (local-first behavior) - Firebase Authentication (email/password) - Cloud Firestore sync per user (`userId`) - Input validation, edit/delete/list/details flows - Sensor or mock API autofill support for selected fields - Localization with Slovenian and English strings
## Tech stack
- Kotlin - Jetpack Compose - Room + KSP - Navigation Compose - ViewModel + StateFlow - Kotlin Coroutines + Flow - Firebase Auth + Firestore - Retrofit + Gson
## SDK targets
- `minSdk = 28` - `targetSdk = 36` - `compileSdk = 36`
## Firebase and Gradle setup
This project uses a Version Catalog (`gradle/libs.versions.toml`) and plugin aliases.
### 1) Place Firebase config file
- Copy `google-services.json` to `app/google-services.json`.
### 2) Use required versions
In `gradle/libs.versions.toml`:
- `googleServices = "4.4.4"` - `firebaseBom = "34.11.0"`
### 3) Root Gradle plugin registration
In `build.gradle.kts`:
```kotlin plugins { // ... alias(libs.plugins.google.services) apply false } ```
### 4) App module plugin and Firebase SDKs
In `app/build.gradle.kts`:
```kotlin plugins { id("com.android.application") // or alias(libs.plugins.android.application)
id("com.google.gms.google-services") // or alias(libs.plugins.google.services) }
dependencies { implementation(platform("com.google.firebase:firebase-bom:34.11.0"))
// add Firebase products you use implementation("com.google.firebase:firebase-auth") implementation("com.google.firebase:firebase-firestore") } ```
Equivalent alias-based setup already used in this project:
- `implementation(platform(libs.firebase.bom))` - `implementation(libs.firebase.auth)` - `implementation(libs.firebase.firestore)`
### 5) Sync project
```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" .\gradlew.bat --refresh-dependencies ```
## Firebase Console checklist
1. Create a Firebase project. 2. Add Android app with package `com.example.health_app`. 3. Enable `Authentication > Sign-in method > Email/Password`. 4. Create Firestore database (test mode for development).
## Firestore security rules (recommended)
```javascript rules_version = '2'; service cloud.firestore { match /databases/{database}/documents { match /meritve/{meritevId} { allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId; allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId; } } } ```
## Run
```powershell Set-Location "D:\1\TZVA\android-health-app" .\gradlew.bat :app:assembleDebug ```
Then run from Android Studio on an emulator/device (API 28+).
## Quick verification checklist
- Register user with valid email and password (6+ chars) - Login and open measurement input screen - Save measurement and confirm list/details update - Trigger cloud sync and verify Firestore documents - Logout and confirm app returns to auth screen - Switch language and verify translated strings

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp">
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.BODY_SENSORS" /> <uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.sensor.heartrate" android:required="false" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:usesCleartextTraffic="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp">
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.Healthapp"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
</application>
</manifest>

originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Health App</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">New Measurement</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Measurement List</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Measurement Details</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Edit Measurement</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">First Name</string> <string name="priimek">Last Name</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Measurement Date</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Heart Rate (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperature (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Health Data</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Heart Rate</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperature</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Health Status</string> <string name="normalno">Normal</string> <string name="nenormalno">Abnormal</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Save Measurement</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Measurement List</string> <string name="izbrisi">Delete</string> <string name="preklici">Cancel</string> <string name="potrdi">Confirm</string> <string name="uredi">Edit</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Field is required</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Value must be between 30 and 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Value must be between 0 and 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Value must be between 34.0 and 42.0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Invalid input</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Measurement saved successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Measurement updated successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Measurement deleted</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Error saving measurement</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Confirm Deletion</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Are you sure you want to delete this measurement?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Search by name…</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="ni_meritev">No saved measurements</string> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Measurement not found</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Health App</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">New Measurement</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Measurement List</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Measurement Details</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Edit Measurement</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">First Name</string> <string name="priimek">Last Name</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Measurement Date</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Heart Rate (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperature (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Health Data</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Heart Rate</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperature</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Health Status</string> <string name="normalno">Normal</string> <string name="nenormalno">Abnormal</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Save Measurement</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Measurement List</string> <string name="izbrisi">Delete</string> <string name="preklici">Cancel</string> <string name="potrdi">Confirm</string> <string name="uredi">Edit</string> <string name="sinhroniziraj">Sync</string> <string name="odjava">Logout</string> <string name="prijava">Login</string> <string name="registracija">Register</string> <string name="email">Email</string> <string name="geslo">Password</string> <string name="pokazi_geslo">Show</string> <string name="skrij_geslo">Hide</string> <string name="nimas_racuna">No account? Register</string> <string name="imas_racun">Already have an account? Login</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Field is required</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Value must be between 30 and 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Value must be between 0 and 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Value must be between 34.0 and 42.0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Invalid input</string> <string name="neveljaven_email">Invalid email format</string> <string name="geslo_prekratko">Password must be at least 6 characters</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Measurement saved successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Measurement updated successfully!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Measurement deleted</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Error saving measurement</string> <string name="sinhronizirano">Synchronization complete</string> <string name="shranjeno_lokalno_oblak_nedosegljiv">Saved locally (cloud unavailable)</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Confirm Deletion</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Are you sure you want to delete this measurement?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Search by name…</string> <string name="prijavljen_kot">Signed in: %1$s</string> <string name="preberi_srcni_utrip">Read heart rate (sensor/API)</string> <string name="preberi_spo2">Read SpO2 (API)</string> <string name="preberi_temperaturo">Read temperature (API)</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="ni_meritev">No saved measurements</string> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Measurement not found</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Zdravstvena aplikacija</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">Nova meritev</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Podrobnosti meritve</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Uredi meritev</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">Ime</string> <string name="priimek">Priimek</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Datum meritve</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Srčni utrip (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperatura (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Zdravstveni podatki</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Srčni utrip</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperatura</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Zdravstveno stanje</string> <string name="normalno">Normalno</string> <string name="nenormalno">Nenormalno</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Shrani meritev</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="izbrisi">Izbriši</string> <string name="preklici">Prekliči</string> <string name="potrdi">Potrdi</string> <string name="uredi">Uredi</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Polje je obvezno</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 30 in 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 0 in 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 34,0 in 42,0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Neveljaven vnos</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Meritev uspešno shranjena!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Meritev uspešno posodobljena!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Meritev izbrisana</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Napaka pri shranjevanju meritve</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Potrdi brisanje</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Ali ste prepričani, da želite izbrisati to meritev?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Iskanje po imenu…</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="ni_meritev">Ni shranjenih meritev</string> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Meritev ni najdena</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Zdravstvena aplikacija</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nova_meritev">Nova meritev</string> <string name="seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="podrobnosti_meritve">Podrobnosti meritve</string> <string name="uredi_meritev">Uredi meritev</string>
<!-- Form labels --> <string name="ime">Ime</string> <string name="priimek">Priimek</string> <string name="datum_meritve">Datum meritve</string> <string name="srcni_utrip">Srčni utrip (bpm)</string> <string name="spo2">SpO2 (%)</string> <string name="temperatura">Temperatura (°C)</string>
<!-- Detail labels --> <string name="zdravstveni_podatki">Zdravstveni podatki</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_label">Srčni utrip</string> <string name="spo2_label">SpO2</string> <string name="temperatura_label">Temperatura</string> <string name="zdravstveno_stanje">Zdravstveno stanje</string> <string name="normalno">Normalno</string> <string name="nenormalno">Nenormalno</string>
<!-- Units --> <string name="bpm_value">%d bpm</string> <string name="spo2_value">SpO2: %d%%</string> <string name="spo2_detail_value">%d %%</string> <string name="temp_value">%s °C</string>
<!-- Buttons --> <string name="shrani_meritev">Shrani meritev</string> <string name="btn_seznam_meritev">Seznam meritev</string> <string name="izbrisi">Izbriši</string> <string name="preklici">Prekliči</string> <string name="potrdi">Potrdi</string> <string name="uredi">Uredi</string> <string name="sinhroniziraj">Sinhroniziraj</string> <string name="odjava">Odjava</string> <string name="prijava">Prijava</string> <string name="registracija">Registracija</string> <string name="email">E-pošta</string> <string name="geslo">Geslo</string> <string name="pokazi_geslo">Pokaži</string> <string name="skrij_geslo">Skrij</string> <string name="nimas_racuna">Nimaš računa? Registriraj se</string> <string name="imas_racun">Imaš račun? Prijavi se</string>
<!-- Validation --> <string name="polje_obvezno">Polje je obvezno</string> <string name="srcni_utrip_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 30 in 250 bpm</string> <string name="spo2_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 0 in 100 %%</string> <string name="temperatura_napaka">Vrednost mora biti med 34,0 in 42,0 °C</string> <string name="neveljaven_vnos">Neveljaven vnos</string> <string name="neveljaven_email">Neveljavna oblika e-pošte</string> <string name="geslo_prekratko">Geslo mora imeti vsaj 6 znakov</string>
<!-- Snackbar --> <string name="meritev_shranjena">Meritev uspešno shranjena!</string> <string name="meritev_posodobljena">Meritev uspešno posodobljena!</string> <string name="meritev_izbrisana">Meritev izbrisana</string> <string name="napaka_shranjevanja">Napaka pri shranjevanju meritve</string> <string name="sinhronizirano">Sinhronizacija uspešna</string> <string name="shranjeno_lokalno_oblak_nedosegljiv">Shranjeno lokalno (oblak ni dosegljiv)</string>
<!-- Delete dialog --> <string name="potrdi_brisanje">Potrdi brisanje</string> <string name="potrdi_brisanje_sporocilo">Ali ste prepričani, da želite izbrisati to meritev?</string>
<!-- Search --> <string name="iskanje">Iskanje po imenu…</string> <string name="prijavljen_kot">Prijavljen: %1$s</string> <string name="preberi_srcni_utrip">Preberi srčni utrip (senzor/API)</string> <string name="preberi_spo2">Preberi SpO2 (API)</string> <string name="preberi_temperaturo">Preberi temperaturo (API)</string>
<!-- Empty state --> <string name="ni_meritev">Ni shranjenih meritev</string> <string name="meritev_ni_najdena">Meritev ni najdena</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
